# Scoring Rubric: [Eval Name]
<!-- Replace [Eval Name] to match your eval README.md -->
<!-- Customize dimensions, weights, and descriptions for your use case -->
<!-- DELETE these comments once you've customized the rubric -->

## Dimensions
<!-- Each dimension is scored 1-5. Add or remove dimensions to match your needs. -->
<!-- Weights must sum to 100%. -->

### Accuracy (weight: [X]%)

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | Completely correct, no factual errors |
| 4 | Mostly correct, minor inaccuracies that don't mislead |
| 3 | Partially correct, some notable errors |
| 2 | Significant errors, only partially useful |
| 1 | Incorrect or misleading |

### Relevance (weight: [X]%)

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | Directly addresses the input, fully on-topic |
| 4 | Mostly relevant, minor tangents |
| 3 | Somewhat relevant, misses key aspects |
| 2 | Mostly off-topic, addresses wrong problem |
| 1 | Completely irrelevant |

### Tone & Style (weight: [X]%)
<!-- If using brand docs, reference BRAND-PROFILE.md and STYLE-GUIDE.md here -->

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | Matches brand voice perfectly, follows all style rules |
| 4 | Mostly on-brand, minor tone inconsistencies |
| 3 | Recognizably on-brand but noticeably off in places |
| 2 | Mostly off-brand, wrong tone for context |
| 1 | Completely wrong voice — generic, robotic, or inappropriate |

### Completeness (weight: [X]%)

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | Covers all required elements, nothing missing |
| 4 | Covers most elements, minor omissions |
| 3 | Missing some important elements |
| 2 | Missing most required elements |
| 1 | Barely addresses the requirements |

<!-- Add more dimensions as needed:
### [Custom Dimension] (weight: [X]%)
| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | [Best case] |
| 4 | [Good] |
| 3 | [Acceptable] |
| 2 | [Below standard] |
| 1 | [Unacceptable] |
-->

## Passing Threshold

- Minimum weighted average: **[X]** / 5
- No single dimension below: **[X]**
